---
title: "LMEFContrast"
generated: true
description: "Per-voxel mixed-model F-contrast result."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme.reml`](../nitrix-stats-lme-reml.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:LMEFContrast -->
```python
class LMEFContrast(NamedTuple)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:LMEFContrast -->
Per-voxel mixed-model F-contrast result.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
